channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: ASIC collects $830m in fines targeting major banks and corporate misconduct
item.description: The Australian Securities and Investments Commission (ASIC) has imposed a record $830 million in civil penalties during the past financial year, marking a significant increase compared to the previous...

item.title: Landslides in Nagaland's Mon District Kill 5, Leave 4 Missing
item.description: A series of devastating landslides triggered by heavy rainfall in Nagaland’s Mon district on Sunday resulted in at least five deaths and four people missing. Officials confirmed that search and rescue...

item.title: Retirees Return as Lifeguards in Montreal
item.description: Montreal retirees are returning to work as lifeguards, marking a significant shift in how communities address aging populations and public safety. The initiative, highlighted in a recent article, refl...

item.title: Dr Basil Enicker Appointed President of College of Neurosurgeons of South Africa
item.description: Dr Basil Enicker, Head of the Discipline of Neurosurgery at the University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN) and Inkosi Albert Luthuli Central Hospital, has been appointed President of the College of Neurosurge...

item.title: Netflix acquires Ben Affleck's AI startup for $587 million
item.description: Netflix has disclosed that it paid $587 million in cash for Ben Affleck's AI company, InterPositive, according to a securities filing. The acquisition, first reported in March, marks a significant mov...

item.title: GitHub Copilot simplifies DNS setup for developers
item.description: The article discusses GitHub's demonstration of using Copilot CLI and a Namecheap skill to automate DNS configuration for GitHub Pages, eliminating manual steps like A record setup and CNAME entries. ...

item.title: Troops in Benue State Kill Bandits, Rescue Kidnapped Victims
item.description: Troops under Operation Whirl Stroke (OPWS) collaborated with Benue State Civil Protection Guard to eliminate two suspected bandits and rescue three kidnapped victims in Katsina-Ala LGA. The operation,...

item.title: Tanzania boosts education and innovation to honor Mandela’s legacy
item.description: Tanzania is making significant investments in quality education, skills development, and innovation to honor Nelson Mandela's enduring legacy. The country's focus on these areas reflects a commitment ...

item.title: PCSO Lotto Results for July 19, 2026 Announced
item.description: The Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) has released the official lotto results for July 19, 2026. This update is part of PCSO's regular announcements providing winners with their prizes. The...

item.title: England Manager Tuchel Asks Players to Reflect on World Cup Memories with Pride

item.title: A Deep Dive into the Legacy of 'American Graffiti' (1973)
item.description: American Graffiti (1973), directed by George Lucas and produced by Francis Ford Coppola, is a seminal coming-of-age film that captures the essence of American youth culture in 1962. Set in Modesto, Ca...

item.description: Coach Dave Rennie has expressed excitement about the All Blacks' progress following their three-match victory streak in the Nations Championship, but cautioned that the upcoming four-Test series again...

item.title: Former Kano Governor Praises Peter Obi's Integrity and Leadership
item.description: Rabiu Kwankwaso, former Kano State Governor, has publicly commended Peter Obi, the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) presidential candidate, for his exceptional character and dedication to Nigeria's p...

item.title: Military Inquiry into Naval Contracts and Alleged Corruption in Western Australia
item.description: A retired senior naval officer is facing a secret military disciplinary process over unspecified allegations involving lucrative defence contracts in Western Australia. The inquiry, which involves a c...

item.title: Iran-Iraq Conflict Escalates as Missiles Target Jordan and Threaten Regional Stability
item.description: The article details the escalating conflict between Iran and Israel, with Iran launching missiles toward Jordan and warning of potential spillover into Israeli territory. The U.S. military conducted a...

item.title: Students' Hunger Strike in Delhi Sparks Demand for Government Dialogue
item.description: A group of citizens has written to Prime Minister Narendra Modi, urging him to engage in dialogue with students who have been on a hunger strike at Jantar Mantar in Delhi since June 28. The protest, l...

item.title: Kakamega Leaders Vow to Prevent Vote Division Ahead of 2027 Election
item.description: Kakamega politicians, led by Cooperatives Cabinet Secretary Wycliffe Oparanya, have vowed to block attempts to split Luhya votes ahead of the 2027 general election. During a rally in Shinyalu constitu...

item.title: NBI maintains focus on SEA Games corruption investigation amid political tensions
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) has reiterated its commitment to probing alleged corruption in the 2019 Southeast Asian Games despite Senator Alan Peter Cayetano's recent derogatory remarks...

item.title: Twisted Sister's New Vocalist: Fan Reaction and Band's Decision
item.description: Twisted Sister's guitarist Jay Jay French has stated that fans will ultimately determine the success of Sebastian Bach as the band's new vocalist. Following Dee Snider's health issues, which forced th...
